amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.
Users may enter and exit the facility more than one time.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.
The facility is wheelchair accessible.

items.full_description: This amount covers fees charged by the facility operator for costs such as airport charges, facility fees, and additional operator expenses, as estimated by SpotHero.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.

arrival.text: Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so will result in a ticket or tow.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Gather your belongings and head to the shuttle pick-up area. Guests have to schedule a time by calling 972-374-3600.

departure.text: When you arrive back at DFW, gather your belongings and call 972-374-3600 to request the shuttle. Head to the shuttle pick-up area to meet the shuttle.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: TownePlace Suites Hotel DFW Airport - Uncovered Self Park
common.operator_display_name: LodgeCap DFW LP (Towne Place Suites Hotel) Parking
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 4800 Plaza Dr. This is the TownePlace Suites Hotel DFW Airport lot, operated by LodgeCap DFW LP (Towne Place Suites Hotel). It is located on the Southwest side of Plaza Dr. between Dulles Dr. and Heathrow Dr.
restrictions: The shuttle van runs 7 days a week. Starts at 4am to 12 midnight and runs at the top of every hour. Guests have to schedule a time by calling 972-374-3600.

amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The facility has a roof over the vehicles.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.
The facility is wheelchair accessible.

items.full_description: A fee determined by the garage operator to cover additional garage operator costs.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.
A fee determined by the garage operator to cover additional garage operator costs.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.

arrival.text: No need to pull a ticket! Pull up to our facility entrance and scan your SpotHero QR code to open the gate.
Once you have scanned your QR code, an attendant will ask you what terminal you are flying out of and direct you where to park.
The Parking Spot shuttle will pick you up directly at your vehicle to take you to the airport.

departure.text: After your flight home, proceed to the lower level of your Terminal and The Parking Spot DFW PREMIUM & NORTH shuttle will meet you under the gray "Courtesy Van" sign on either end of the concourse (as of 3/4/19, both The Parking Spot PREMIUM and NORTH are accessible by the same fleet). The shuttle you are on will either stop at one more Terminal or head directly back to The Parking Spot. You'll do a brief drop-off at The Parking Spot PREMIUM (if any guests on the shuttle parked there), and then quickly head back to NORTH. If you land between 10 PM and 7 AM, please call us at (972) 915-3672 for pick-up. Upon return, please claim your luggage and follow the pick up instructions on the Locator Slip provided by your shuttle driver.
The shuttle will bring you to your car. From there, follow the signs to the exit.

common.title: The Parking Spot North - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 4505 Plaza Drive. This is The Parking Spot North. It is located on the NE side of Plaza Dr. between Heathrow Dr. and O Hare Dr.
restrictions: The Parking Spot reservations are non-refundable and may not be cancelled.
Complimentary bottled water is available at checkout.

Due to ongoing Terminal Renewal and Improvement Program(TRIP) at DFW airport, drop-off/pick-up points may move. At pick-up, please follow the airport's signage to the courtesy van shuttle stops on the lower level. While we strive to maintain 5-7 min.
If you park outside your reservation times, you will be charged for each additional day upon exit.
Please have your QR code ready to scan when you arrive. This helps us get you parked and on your way in no time. Thank you!
The Parking Spot reservations may be changed up to 1 hour prior to your scheduled arrival time.

arrival.text: Show the hotel front desk your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed or on a mobile device. You will be asked to fill out additional paperwork with your vehicle's make and model and will receive a permit to display in your windshield during your stay.

departure.text: When you return to DFW, please call the hotel at (972) 915-3993 to arrange return shuttle pickup.

common.title: Motel 6 - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 7800 Heathrow Dr. This is the Motel 6 DFW North lot. It is located on the east side of Heathrow Dr. between Plaza Dr. and John W Carpenter Freeway.
restrictions: Shuttle service to DFW is available at no additional cost from this location daily. The shuttle runs every 40 minutes between 3:30 AM and 2:00 AM. Between 2:00 AM-3:30 AM the shuttle runs on-demand. When you return to DFW, please call the hotel at (972) 915-3993 to arrange return shuttle pickup.

common.title: DFW Airport Marriott - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 8440 Freeport Parkway, Irving, TX. This is the DFW Airport Marriott Lot, operated by Towne Park. It is located on the right-hand side of John Carpenter Fwy. (a one-way street) between Ester Blvd. and Freeport Pkwy St.
restrictions: Standard sized vehicles only. Due to size constraints, this location is unable to accommodate minivans, midsize and large SUVs, pickup trucks, and passenger vans.
The shuttle runs every 30 minutes starting at the top of the hour.

common.title: The Westin DFW Airport - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 8203 Esters Blvd. This is the The Westin Dallas Fort Worth Airport lot. It is located on the West side of Esters Blvd. between W Royal Ln. and W John Carpenter Fwy.
restrictions: For shuttle pickups, guests should call the hotel after landing to schedule their ride.
Shuttle service is limited to two passengers per vehicle.
Shuttles run to the airport every top of the hour, with pickup and drop-off taking place at the courtesy shuttle area at each terminal.

arrival.text: Arrive at the Red Roof Inn and show the clerk at the front desk your SpotHero reservation. You will be directed to fill out a form with your name, plate #, and arrival & departure times. You will receive a permit to put in your windshield.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved". Take the free shuttle to the airport!

departure.text: When you arrive back at DFW, call the hotel at (972) 929-0020 for the shuttle to pick you up. Once back at the hotel, simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Red Roof Inn - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 8150 Esters Blvd. This is the Red Roof Inn Dallas - DFW Airport North lot. It is located on the east side of Esters Blvd. between Hwy 114 and W Royal Ln. You can only access this location traveling north on Esters Blvd.
restrictions: Shuttle service to DFW is available at no additional cost from this location 24/7. The shuttle departs from the hotel every 40 minutes. When you return to DFW, call the hotel at (972) 929-0020 to arrange return shuttle pickup.

arrival.text: For parking, please go to the Front Desk (available 24/7) to register your vehicle and collect a parking pass. Vehicles without a parking pass will be towed at the owner's expense.
Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so will result in a ticket or tow.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".

Shuttle service is only available for guests parking for 3 days or more. Guests must call ahead to have a seat assigned. Please note that it can get busy during early morning hours; other times are usually fine.

departure.text: Upon your return to DFW, please gather your belongings and proceed to the designated shuttle pick-up area for transportation back to the hotel.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Quality Inn & Suites Irving DFW Airport South - Uncovered Self Park
common.operator_display_name: Quality Inn & Suites Irving DFW Airport Parking
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 4940 W Airport Fwy. This is the Quality Inn & Suites Irving DFW Airport South  Lot, operated by Quality Inn & Suites Irving DFW Airport. It is located on the South/Right-hand side of W Airport Fwy. (a one-way street) between County Line Rd. and Valley View Ln.
restrictions: Shuttle service is only available for guests parking for 3 days or more. Guests must call ahead to have a seat assigned. Please note that it can get busy during early morning hours; other times are usually fine.

common.title: The Parking Spot South - Standard Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1945 Valley View Ln. This is the The Parking Spot South lot. It is located on the west side of Valley View Ln. between W Pioneer Dr. and W Airport Fwy. The entrance is marked by a yellow and black "The Parking Spot" sign.
restrictions: The Parking Spot reservations are non-refundable and may not be cancelled.
Complimentary bottled water is available at checkout.

DFW Airport has started a 90-day construction project to replace the Terminal B flyover bridge and connect a new bridge to the roadway system. Terminals A and C will undergo similar work in upcoming phases. DFW Airport is asking travelers to plan for an extra 30–45 minutes of travel time due to detours and potential traffic delays.
If you park outside your reservation times, you will be charged for each additional day upon exit.
Please have your QR code ready to scan when you arrive. This helps us get you parked and on your way in no time. Thank you!
The Parking Spot reservations may be changed up to 1 hour prior to your scheduled arrival time.

departure.text: When you return to DFW, please call (469) 702-6311 to arrange return shuttle pickup.

common.title: Four Points by Sheraton DFW Airport North - Uncovered Self Park
common.operator_display_name: Four Points by Sheraton DFW Airport North Parking
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1580 Point W Blvd. This is the Four Points by Sheraton DFW Airport North uncovered self-park. It is located on the east side of  Point W Blvd. between Lyndon B. Johnson FWY and Dividend Dr. The hotel is marked by blue 'Four Points by Sheraton' signage.
restrictions: Customers must arrive 30 minutes prior to departure time to receive shuttle service.

Shuttle service to DFW is available at no additional cost from this location 24/7. The shuttle runs every 60 minutes to and from the airport. When you return to DFW, please call (469) 702-6311 to arrange return shuttle pickup. You MUST call for the shuttle upon your return. Barring any major traffic and/or road closures, you will be picked up within 30 minutes of calling.

arrival.text: Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so will result in a ticket or tow.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
After securing your belongings you may board the shuttle bound for DFW. The shuttle runs every 30 mins to all DFW terminals. Call at (214) 494-1744, 30 minutes in advance to schedule your shuttle.

departure.text: Upon your return, please call at (214) 494-1744, shuttle service leaves every 30 minutes upon request to all DFW Airport terminals including Terminal A, B, C, D, and E.
Once back at the lot, simply leave when you’re ready to go!

common.title: DFW Airport Parking by Ausby - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 977 Del Paso St. 2nd Level. This is the DFW Airport Parking by Ausby lot, operated by DFW Airport Parking by Ausby. It is located on the Northeast side of Del Paso St. between S Industrial Blvd. and W Euless Blvd. You can only access this location by traveling Northwest on Del Paso St.
restrictions:
Our shuttle service runs every 30 minutes from 10 AM to 9:30 PM CST daily. After-hours service runs from 9:31 PM to 9:59 AM daily for $25 + tax per pickup.

To book a ride, call (214) 494-1744 at least 30 minutes prior to their arrival to schedule and confirm their shuttle service. Our shuttle ensures a hassle-free journey to and from the lot. Inform our staff of your travel plans, and we'll assist you within shuttle hours.
https://www.dfwairportparkingbyausby.com to pay after hours fees.

arrival.text: This location is monitored according to the license plate listed on your SpotHero pass. Make sure the information on your pass matches the plate number on your vehicle. Failure to do so may result in a ticket or a tow
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Gather your belongings and head to the shuttle pickup area. The shuttle runs every 30 mins, 7-days per week, from 6 AM -10:30 PM.

departure.text: When you arrive back to DFW, gather your belongings and head to the shuttle pickup area for your ride back to the hotel.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Embassy Suites Dallas Grapevine - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 2401 Bass Pro Dr. This is the Embassy Suites Dallas Grapevine lot, operated by PMC. It is located on the north side of Bass Pro Dr. between Big Buck Dr. and Rte 26.

amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.

arrival.text: Upon arriving, please park in the designated spots marked with a maroon dot and check in with the front desk.
After securing your vehicle you may proceed to board the shuttle to DFW, which leaves the hotel at the top of every hour.

departure.text: After securing your luggage, call us to schedule pickup (214-888-4088). Proceed down to the lower level towards the “Courtesy Van” area and wait for shuttle.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Aloft Dallas DFW Airport Grapevine - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1155 Northpoint Dr. This is the Aloft Dallas DFW Airport Grapevine Lot. It is located on the Southeast side of Northpoint Dr. between Frontage Rd. and  S Royal Ln.
restrictions: The airport shuttle is scheduled to leave on the top of the hour between 7 am - 10 pm.
